description_long: This bungalow features a rectangular footprint with a red gable roof and two skylights symmetrically placed on each roof slope. The front facade is characterized by large, multi-pane windows flanked by wooden shutters, and a central black section that contrasts with the lighter wood siding. On one side, a wooden staircase leads up to a raised entry door, supported by posts and featuring a small landing. The rear and opposite side of the building are more austere, with no visible windows or doors, and the siding is uniformly dark. The overall design is simple yet functional, with clear elements of traditional bungalow architecture and practical access features.
description: A rectangular bungalow with a red gable roof, large front windows, and a side staircase leading to a raised entry. The exterior combines dark and light wood siding for a classic, functional appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing large multi-pane windows, wooden shutters, and the main facade details.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wooden staircase and raised entry door, with the gable roof visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain dark facade with no windows or doors, and two skylights on the roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a solid dark wall with no openings and the gable roof.
